_comment: JARVIS Android — API endpoint configuration per environment.

production._note_read_timeout: 0 = no read timeout — required for SSE streaming which can last indefinitely

local_relay._comment: Point to JARVIS relay server on the homelab (Proxmox CT104) for on-prem routing.

dev._comment: Local dev — Android emulator uses 10.0.2.2 to reach the host machine.
